metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_4817
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 2: Otoferlin (OTOF) binds calcium ions and interacts with Syntaxin1 and SNAP25

Figure 5: auditory inner hair cell (IHC) ribbon synapses develop normally in Oterfilin -/- mice

Figure 6,S6: Calcium-triggered exocytosis is almost completely abolished in the absence of Otoferlin. Experimental description: M&M: "Electron Microscopy. Mouse cochleas were fixed as described"

antibody:

Authors used 3 different antibodies against OTOF throughout this study, the N14 antibody was used for EM.

From supplemental M&M: "Two rabbit polyclonal antibodies and one mouse monoclonal antibody were generated against mouse otoferlin. The N14 immune serum was raised against the synthetic peptide GKTRSHKEEPQRQDEP (aa 196-211) located in the C2A-C2B interdomain, and the corresponding antibodies were affinity-purified."

checks.label: OWL Consistency
